title: Glowix
description: A complete emissive resource pack that adds natural glow to blocks, items, entities, and particles.
body:
![Glowix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40824e904b4100451744558914af4c4fd55497f5.png)
Glowix is an emissive resource pack that enhances Minecraft with subtle, immersive lighting while staying true to the vanilla style.

- Adds emissive textures to blocks, items, entities, and particles
- Enhances visibility and atmosphere, especially in dark areas
- Designed to match Minecraft’s original look without overdoing the glow
- Works across many in-game elements including ores, redstone, entities, and effects

Requirements:
- Optifine
  
    OR
  
- Continuity
- Entity Texture Features (ETF)

Customization:
- Glowing ores can be disabled using Respackopts

Glowix focuses on clean visuals, consistency, and performance, making it a good fit for both vanilla+ and modded gameplay.

This pack is fully complete and includes all planned emissive features.

Credit:redstone and target block by Glowing rp
